Using @def-OR,
@def-c-odds,
the [law of conditional probability](probability.qmd#thm-law-conditional-prob),
and the [definition of conditional probability](probability.qmd#def-conditional-prob):

$$
\ba
\ror(A|B) &\eqdef \frac{\odds(A|B)}{\odds(A|\neg B)}
&& \text{(definition of odds ratio)}
\\ &= \frac
{\paren{\frac{\p(A|B)}{\p(\neg A|B)}}}
{\paren{\frac{\p(A|\neg B)}{\p(\neg A| \neg B)}}}
&& \text{(definition of conditional odds)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(A|B)}{\p(\neg A|B)}}
\inv{\frac{\p(A|\neg B)}{\p(\neg A| \neg B)}}
&& \text{(division is multiplication by the reciprocal)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(A|B)}{\p(\neg A|B)}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg A| \neg B)}{\p(A|\neg B)}}
&& \text{(the reciprocal of a fraction flips it)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(A|B)}{\p(\neg A|B)} \cd \frac{\p(B)}{\p(B)}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg A| \neg B)}{\p(A|\neg B)} \cd \frac{\p(\neg B)}{\p(\neg B)}}
&& \text{(multiply each factor by 1)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(A,B)}{\p(\neg A,B)}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg A, \neg B)}{\p(A, \neg B)}}
&& \text{(law of conditional probability, in each of the four terms)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(B,A)}{\red{\p(B,\neg A)}}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg B, \neg A)}{\teal{\p(\neg B, A)}}}
&& \text{(joint probabilities are symmetric in their arguments)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(B,A)}{\teal{\p(\neg B, A)}}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg B, \neg A)}{\red{\p(B,\neg A)}}}
&& \text{(swap the two highlighted denominators)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(B,A) / \p(A)}{\p(\neg B, A) / \p(A)}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg B, \neg A) / \p(\neg A)}{\p(B,\neg A) / \p(\neg A)}}
&& \text{(divide the top and bottom of each factor by the same quantity)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(B|A)}{\p(\neg B|A)}}
\paren{\frac{\p(\neg B| \neg A)}{\p(B|\neg A)}}
&& \text{(definition of conditional probability, in each of the four terms)}
\\ &=
\paren{\frac{\p(B|A)}{\p(\neg B|A)}}
\inv{\frac{\p(B|\neg A)}{\p(\neg B| \neg A)}}
&& \text{(a flipped fraction is the reciprocal of the original)}
\\ &= \frac
{\paren{\frac{\p(B|A)}{\p(\neg B|A)}}}
{\paren{\frac{\p(B|\neg A)}{\p(\neg B| \neg A)}}}
&& \text{(multiplication by the reciprocal is division)}
\\ &= \frac{\odds(B|A)}{\odds(B|\neg A)}
&& \text{(definition of conditional odds)}
\\ &\eqdef \ror(B|A)
&& \text{(definition of odds ratio)}
\ea
$$
